items.question: What is f′(x) for f(x) = x³?
items.explanation: Power rule: d/dx x^n = n x^{n-1}.

items.question: At a local minimum where f is differentiable, f′(x) equals:
items.explanation: Interior local extrema occur at critical points where f′=0 (or undefined).

items.question: Which function is continuous but not differentiable at x=0?
items.explanation: Absolute value has a corner at 0—left and right slopes differ.
